MWCapture SDK  3.3.1.1556

MWCapture SDKv3 Examples

SDKv3 provides plenty of examples for a variety of programming languages, including C++ Examples, C Sharp Examples, VB Examples, Java Examples and Python.

1. C++

SDKv3 provides various C/C++ application examples, which cover all common features including retrieving device information, setting parameters, and capturing and rendering audio and video data. GUI (C++) provides a graphical user interface (GUI), and CmdTools (C++) does not.

2. C Sharp

SDKv3 provides GUI examples in C Sharp. You can refer to C Sharp Examples to build your own C Sharp applications.

3. VB

SDKv3 provides lots of VB examples. You can refer to VB Examples to build your own VB applications.

4. Java

SDKv3 provides GUI Java examples. You can refer to Java Examples to build your own Java applications.

5. Python

SDKv3 provides a Python application of AVCapturePY. You can refer to Python to build your own applications.
